[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011100011 6
1 1101011001 6
2 1101110100 6
3 0011011111 7
4 1000111011 6
5 1110000111 6
6 1100100000 3
7 1101100000 4
